subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto God, Who hath guided us to the Dayspring of His signs, the Dawning-Place of His clear tokens, the Manifestation of His names and the Source of His attributes [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی هدانا الی مطلع آیاته و مشرق بیناته و مظهر اسمائه و مطلع صفاته
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @praise and encouragement
